2606.24488.title: RetiSEM: Generalising Causal Models for Fragmented Biomedical Data
2606.24488.paper_summary: Learning causal models from fragmented biomedical data is challenging because clinical, molecular, and imaging variables are often incomplete or not jointly observed. We propose RetiSEM, a domain-constrained structural equation modelling (SEM) framework for causal graph recovery and mediation analysis under limited multimodal resources. This proposed work organises variables into biologically informed blocks, applies forbidden-edge constraints, and decomposes pathway-level effects into TE, NDE, and NIE components. We evaluate RetiSEM across ten synthetic benchmark scenarios that vary in dimensionality, nonlinearity, causal depth, and pathway structure, together with a fragmented real-world setting that combines NHANES clinical variables with externally derived retinal representations. This approach achieves lower structural error and higher causal accuracy than unconstrained baselines across the synthetic benchmarks. In the real-data analysis, retinal variables behave mainly as downstream biomarker-like indicators, with smaller but detectable indirect effects. These findings support our strategy as an interpretable framework for testing structured causal hypotheses in limited-resource biomedical AI. The code and resources for this work are publicly available at: https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM.
2606.24488.paper_summary_zh: 從碎片化的生物醫學數據中學習因果模型是具有挑戰性的，因為臨床、分子和影像變數往往是不完整的或未共同觀察到的。<lb/>我們提出了RetiSEM，一種受限於領域的結構方程模型（SEM）框架，用於在有限的多模態資源下進行因果圖恢復和中介分析。<lb/>這項提議的工作將變數組織成生物學上有意義的區塊，應用禁止邊約束，並將路徑層級效應分解為TE、NDE和NIE組件。<lb/>我們在十個合成基準場景中評估RetiSEM，這些場景在維度、非線性、因果深度和路徑結構上各不相同，並結合了一個碎片化的真實世界設置，該設置將NHANES臨床變數與外部推導的視網膜表示結合在一起。<lb/>這種方法在合成基準中實現了比不受限基準更低的結構誤差和更高的因果準確性。<lb/>在真實數據分析中，視網膜變數主要作為下游生物標誌物類似的指標，具有較小但可檢測的間接效應。<lb/>這些發現支持我們的策略作為一個可解釋的框架，用於在資源有限的生物醫學AI中測試結構化的因果假設。<lb/>這項工作的代碼和資源可在以下網址公開獲得：https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM。
2606.24488.author: Inam Ullah et.al.
2606.24488.authors: Inam Ullah, Imran Razzak, Shoaib Jameel
